meta.defaultTitle: Chahine Seafood — From the heart of the sea to your heart
meta.defaultDescription: Lebanon's fresh-seafood sandwich house since 1978. Ten branches, one family, one obsession with the catch of the day. Order from the nearest branch on WhatsApp.

hero.tagline: From the heart of the sea to your heart.
hero.subline: Lebanon's fresh-seafood sandwich house. Ten branches, one family, one obsession with the catch of the day.

signatureDish.description: A handful of fresh-caught fillet. A buttered baguette, toasted till it cracks. Lemon, tartare, a few pickles for bite. The sandwich that built this house.
signatureDish.imagePlaceholder: Signature fish sandwich · cutout from IG pipeline

menuPreview.description: Sandwiches, platters, seafood by the kilo, and everything you'd expect from a Lebanese fish house.

branchesTeaser.description: From Tripoli to Saida, there is almost certainly a Chahine Seafood closer to you than you think.

story.body: We started small, in 1978, with a fisherman's ambition and a few good recipes from a Lebanese grandmother. Four decades and ten branches later, the fish is still picked in the morning and the bread is still toasted by hand. Nothing about that part will change.

footer.tagline: From the heart of the sea to your heart.

menu.subhead: Every Chahine Seafood dish, organised into the categories you'll recognise from any of our branches.

menuCategory.subhead: {count, plural, =0 {No items yet.} one {# item available.} other {# items available.}}

branchesPage.subhead: Ten Chahine Seafood locations across Lebanon. Click any branch to start an order on WhatsApp.

paragraphs.one: Chahine Seafood is a Lebanese family business that has been serving the country's finest fried fish since 1978. It started as a single shop in Cola, built on two stubborn rules: use only the day's catch, and toast every baguette to order.
paragraphs.two: Four decades later those rules are the same. What has changed is the reach — ten branches now stretch from Tripoli in the north to Saida in the south, and on any given day the kitchens go through a respectable fraction of what Lebanon's coast pulls in.
paragraphs.three: The name on the sign is Chahine. The people behind it are a family who, still, pick the fish in the morning and serve it by the afternoon. There is no secret more complicated than that.

contactPage.subhead: The fastest way to us is Instagram DM or WhatsApp to your nearest branch.

branches.description: Ten Chahine Seafood branches across Lebanon — Cola, Hamra, Dekwaneh, Dahyeh, Khaldeh, Saida, Alay, Kaslik, Byblos, Tripoli. Find the nearest and order on WhatsApp.

about.title: About
about.description: The Chahine Seafood story — a Lebanese family serving the freshest daily catch since 1978 across ten branches from Tripoli to Saida.
